descriptions: Architected Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) integration for eFeederApp, consolidating 70% of business logic to accelerate cross-platform feature delivery and eliminate redundant engineering effort.
Drove UI modernization strategy by transitioning from legacy XML to Compose Multiplatform, establishing a unified design system that drastically accelerated frontend iteration.
Designed a resilient cross-platform data persistence layer using SQLDelight, guaranteeing seamless offline-first operation and data integrity in remote environments.
Centralized API networking and background synchronization within the shared KMP module via Ktor Client, resolving complex state inconsistencies across platforms.
Overhauled project infrastructure by adopting Hilt for dependency injection and Kotlin DSL for build scripts, mitigating technical debt and streamlining developer onboarding.
Established rigorous quality standards by scaling shared codebase test coverage to 64% utilizing Kotlin Test, MockK, and Turbine, decisively lowering production incident rates.
Orchestrated end-to-end feature lifecycles alongside product stakeholders, delivering high-velocity, mission-critical releases without compromising stability.
Directed technical execution for a 3-engineer Android squad, shipping core Accurate POS features while sustaining rigorous engineering standards and sprint velocity.
Architected a modular MVVM application leveraging Clean Architecture, decoupling core domain logic to ensure systemic testability and long-term scalability.
Pioneered the transition to Jetpack Compose, deprecating fragile XML layouts in favor of declarative UI to significantly reduce frontend development cycles.
Simplified complex dependency graphs by integrating Dagger Hilt, eliminating error-prone boilerplate and enhancing overall system readability.
Engineered seamless client-server communications by consuming complex REST APIs, optimizing payload handling for a highly responsive point-of-sale experience.
Translated complex design wireframes into pixel-perfect, highly responsive Android XML layouts, ensuring a premium e-commerce user experience.
Profiled application memory and resolved critical runtime bottlenecks, delivering a markedly more fluid and stable mobile shopping interface.
Integrated secured consumer-facing REST APIs, ensuring reliable transaction flows and rapid rollout of revenue-driving features.
Engineered and launched three MVP-based Android mobile applications from the ground up, directing the entire lifecycle through to Google Play Store publication.
Mentored junior engineering cohorts via hands-on architectural code reviews, embedding fundamental Android development and clean code practices.
Championed the modernization of legacy enterprise systems by migrating Java codebases to Kotlin and enforcing MVP architectural patterns.
Designed and shipped the BSM Surveyor application from inception, provisioning field agents with a highly reliable and performant mobile data collection tool.
Stabilized business-critical Java CRM applications by resolving deep technical debt, ensuring uninterrupted daily operations alongside continuous feature delivery.
